name: Apple Fritter

sheet.name: Apple Fritter
sheet.background_story:
Zerdos had always stayed in just one part of The Forsaken Lands, because he had heard rumors of The Baldburner (and he is bald). But Zerdos has gathered some courage. He traveled to the Bulwark of the Serpent hoping to secure some magical potions. 
Next is going to The Celestium to assist in releasing those trapped in the void. 
So much courage is building in him!

description:
